title: cephalanthera epipactoides
intro: Cephalanthera epipactoides, also known as the lesser butterfly orchid, is a species of orchid native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cephalanthera epipactoides include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
